title: Dependency Dashboard
body:
This issue lists Renovate updates and detected dependencies. Read the [Dependency Dashboard](https://docs.renovatebot.com/key-concepts/dashboard/) docs to learn more.
[View this repository on the Mend.io Web Portal](https://developer.mend.io/github/containers/image). ## Ignored or Blocked The following updates are blocked by an existing closed PR. To recreate the PR, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] [[skip-ci] Update superbrothers/close-pull-request digest to ee879b9](../pull/2944) - [ ] [fix(deps): update module github.com/sigstore/fulcio to v1.7.1](../pull/2841) - [ ] [fix(deps): update module github.com/stretchr/testify to v1.11.0](../pull/2940) - [ ] [fix(deps): update module github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 to v2.22.0](../pull/2942) ## Detected dependencies
